presets.name: 📸 Фотореалистичный портрет
presets.prompt: A photorealistic close-up portrait of {subject}, soft natural lighting from window, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, professional photography, high detail skin texture, warm color grading
presets.input_prompt: Опишите человека для портрета (например: 'молодая женщина с рыжими волосами'):

presets.name: 🎨 Логотип с текстом
presets.prompt: Create a modern minimalist logo for '{text}'. Clean {style} typography, centered composition, {color_scheme} color palette, professional brand identity, vector style, transparent background concept

presets.name: 😊 Стикер персонаж
presets.prompt: A kawaii-style sticker of a cute {character} with {expression}. Bold clean outlines, simple cel-shading, vibrant colors, white background, digital art

presets.name: 🏞 Пейзаж
presets.prompt: A breathtaking {landscape_type} landscape at {time_of_day}, dramatic lighting, volumetric clouds, highly detailed, cinematic composition, 8k quality

presets.name: 🌀 Абстрактное искусство
presets.prompt: Abstract art with {colors} color palette, {style} style, dynamic composition, flowing shapes, modern contemporary art, high resolution

presets.name: ➕ Добавить объект
presets.prompt: Using the provided image, add {element} to the scene. Ensure the addition matches the original lighting, perspective, and style. Seamless integration, photorealistic blend

presets.name: 🎭 Сменить стиль
presets.prompt: Transform the provided image into {art_style} artistic style. Preserve the original composition and subject matter, but render with {art_style} characteristic techniques, colors, and brushwork

presets.name: 🔧 Реставрация фото
presets.prompt: Faithfully restore this image with high fidelity to modern photograph quality. Remove scratches, damage, and noise. Upscale to 4K resolution, enhance colors while preserving original character

presets.name: 🌄 Сменить фон
presets.prompt: Replace the background of this image with {background_description}. Keep the main subject unchanged, match lighting and perspective for realistic composite

video_generation.name: 🎬 Генерация видео
video_generation.description: Создание видео из текста или изображений

presets.name: 📝 Текст → Видео PRO
presets.prompt: {scene_description}. Cinematic camera movement, professional color grading, smooth motion, high quality

presets.name: 📝 Текст → Видео
presets.prompt: {scene_description}. Cinematic camera movement, professional color grading, smooth motion, high quality

presets.name: 🖼 Изображение → Видео PRO
presets.description: Анимация вашего фото с лучшим качеством
presets.prompt: {animation_description}. Smooth motion, professional quality

presets.name: 🖼 Изображение → Видео
presets.prompt: {animation_description}. Smooth motion, good quality

presets.name: 📦 Продуктовое видео
presets.prompt: Professional product showcase video. Smooth 360-degree rotation, studio lighting, elegant reflections, premium commercial aesthetic

presets.name: 🌿 Природная сцена
presets.prompt: Peaceful nature scene with {nature_element}. Gentle movement, soft lighting, ambient atmosphere, cinematic quality

presets.name: 🏙 Город (вертикальное)
presets.prompt: {city_description}, vertical video format, smooth camera movement, professional lighting, social media ready

presets.name: 🎨 Стиль для видео
presets.prompt: Apply {style} visual style to the reference video @Video1. Maintain motion patterns, transform aesthetic to match {style}

presets.name: ✨ Улучшение качества
presets.prompt: Enhance video quality: improve resolution, stabilize motion, reduce noise, enhance colors and contrast for premium look

seedream_generation.name: 🎨 Seedream AI
seedream_generation.description: Генерация изображений через ByteDance Seedream 5.0 Lite

presets.name: 📝 Текст → Изображение
presets.prompt: {description}

presets.name: 🖼 Изображение → Изображение
presets.prompt: {description}

presets.name: 👤 Портрет
presets.prompt: A photorealistic portrait of {subject}, professional photography, natural lighting, high detail, studio setting

presets.name: 🏞 Пейзаж
presets.prompt: A breathtaking {landscape_type} landscape at {time_of_day}, dramatic lighting, volumetric clouds, highly detailed, cinematic composition, 8k quality
presets.input_prompt: Опишите пейзаж (горы, лес, море и т.д.):

presets.name: 📦 Продукт
presets.prompt: Professional product photography of {product}, clean white background, studio lighting, commercial quality, e-commerce ready

presets.name: 🎨 Арт
presets.prompt: {art_description}, artistic style, creative composition, digital art, high quality

presets.name: 🎬 Серия изображений
presets.prompt: {scene_description}, cinematic scene, professional photography

variations.name: Реализм
variations.prompt_template: Transform this image into photorealistic style. Preserve all details, enhance realism, natural lighting, true-to-life colors.

variations.name: Арт
variations.prompt_template: Transform this image into artistic painting style. Rich brushstrokes, expressive colors, artistic interpretation.

variations.name: Аниме
variations.prompt_template: Transform this image into anime/manga style. Clean lines, vibrant colors, stylized features, Japanese animation aesthetic.

variations.name: Минимализм
variations.prompt_template: Transform this image into minimalist style. Simplified forms, clean composition, essential elements only, modern aesthetic.

variations.name: Золотой час
variations.prompt_template: Apply golden hour lighting to this image. Warm golden tones, soft shadows, magical sunset atmosphere.

variations.name: Неон
variations.prompt_template: Apply neon cyberpunk effect to this image. Glowing neon lights, futuristic atmosphere, vibrant purples and blues.

variations.name: Винтаж
variations.prompt_template: Apply vintage retro effect to this image. Film grain, faded colors, nostalgic 1970s aesthetic.

variations.name: HDR
variations.prompt_template: Apply HDR effect to this image. Enhanced details, high contrast, vivid colors, dramatic lighting.

variations.name: Боке
variations.prompt_template: Apply bokeh effect to this image. Soft background blur, dreamy atmosphere, focus on subject.

variations.name: Ч/Б
variations.prompt_template: Convert this image to black and white. Dramatic contrast, classic monochrome, timeless aesthetic.

variations.name: Весна
variations.prompt_template: Transform this image into spring season. Blooming flowers, fresh green colors, soft rain atmosphere, renewal.

variations.name: Лето
variations.prompt_template: Transform this image into summer season. Bright sunlight, warm tones, vibrant colors, beach vibes.

variations.name: Зима
variations.prompt_template: Transform this image into winter season. Snow covered, cool blue tones, frosty atmosphere, cozy feeling.
